title: Senior Financial Analyst - SBI Life Insurance - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - SBI Life Insurance - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with SBI Life Insurance! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About SBI Life Insurance:
SBI Life Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance!
